name: Momento Angolare
description: Calcola il momento angolare di una particella in moto circolare.
seo_description: Calcola il momento angolare di una particella in moto circolare. Calcolatore gratuito, preciso e istantaneo. Strumento gratuito con formula ed esempi.
example_label: Calcolate results using the provided input values.

range_hints.m: Common weight range for this calculation.
range_hints.v: Enter value within min-max range shown.

result_context: The calculated result provides the main output value.
steps: Calcolate and display the L result
mistakes: Not verifying input values are within realistic ranges for your scenario
Entering zero or negative values where positive numbers are required
Rounding intermediate results too early in multi-step calculations
